problem id: cb5ddb11
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(6)

examples:
  01101101 -> 00000001
  10010010 -> 00000000
  00011001 -> 00000000
  11001011 -> 01100010
  01111000 -> 00000000
  01010100 -> 00000001
  01110100 -> 00000001
  01101010 -> 00000000
  10100000 -> 00000000
  00101000 -> 00000000

query: 10000010
predicted answer: 00000000
